events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the iconic singer-songwriter George Michael, who would have turned 63 today. Born Georgios Kyriacos Panayiotou on June 25, 1963, he rose to fame with Wham! before a hugely successful solo career.

angles.name: George Michael tribute
angles.copy: Today, we're celebrating the incredible legacy of George Michael, who would have been 63. What's your favourite track from the pop icon?

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who passed away on this day in 2009. He would have been 68 this year.

angles.name: MJ tribute
angles.copy: Today marks the anniversary of Michael Jackson's passing. His music continues to inspire generations. What's the MJ track that always gets you moving?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Happy 86th birthday to The Beatles' legendary drummer, Ringo Starr! Born Richard Starkey on July 7, 1940, he's still making music and spreading peace and love.

angles.name: Ringo Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Ringo moment, either with The Beatles or solo?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Celebrating the birthday of Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, who turns 79 today. Born July 19, 1947, his iconic sound has shaped rock music for decades.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Brian May! His guitar riffs are legendary. What's the Queen track where his playing truly shines for you?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger! Born on July 26, 1943, he continues to be a rock and roll icon.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: It's Mick Jagger's 83rd birthday today! The energy, the moves, the voice... what's your ultimate Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV, Music Television, launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? Today marks 45 years since it launched with The Buggles. What was your favourite music video from the early days?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' released
events.blurb: On this day in 1994, Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe'. The album, actually released on August 29, 1994, became an instant classic, defining an era.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album changed everything. What's the track that still gives you goosebumps?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: On this day in 1969, the legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began in Bethel, New York, a three-day festival of peace and music that defined a generation.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, Woodstock kicked off three days of peace and music. If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Today marks the anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing. His impact on music is immeasurable. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tribute to Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: On this day, we remember Tupac Shakur. The influential rapper was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas and tragically died on September 13, 1996. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today. His lyrics and impact are still felt globally. What's the Tupac track that resonates most with you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix. He tragically passed away on September 18, 1970, and would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Today marks the anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing. A true guitar visionary. What's the Jimi Hendrix song that showcases his genius best?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: On this day in 1969, The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road'. The album was actually released on September 26, 1969, in the UK.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover alone is legendary. What's your go-to track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Happy 75th birthday to the iconic frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde! Born on September 7, 1951, her distinctive voice and style continue to rock.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing Chrissie Hynde a very happy 75th birthday! A true rock legend. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Born on September 21, 1972, the Oasis frontman continues to be a rock 'n' roll star.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54 today! Happy Birthday, Liam Gallagher. What's the Oasis or solo track that truly captures his iconic swagger for you?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released
events.blurb: On this day, we highlight John Lennon's 'Imagine'. The iconic album and single were both released in 1971, with the single hitting US airwaves on October 11, 1971. The album was released in the UK on October 8, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon's 'Imagine' – a timeless message. What does this powerful song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: On this day, we mark the release of the first Apple iPod in 2001. The original iPod was announced on October 23, 2001, and began shipping on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Today, we're looking back at the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. Did you have one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, what's your favourite Bond movie or moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. Born on October 9, 1940, his music and message continue to inspire.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: Today, we honour John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision for peace lives on through his music. Which song means the most to you?
